name: @kuiralabs/midnight-vault-contract
description: Midnight Vault — unshielded multisig treasury (Compact). Compiled artifacts under src/managed/Vault/ are consumed by the Android app via the io.github.kuiralabs.contract Gradle plugin; the simulator suite under test/ exercises the contract logic off-chain.

scripts.compile: compact compile +0.31.1 src/Vault.compact src/managed/Vault && compact compile +0.31.1 src/PrivateVault.compact src/managed/PrivateVault && compact compile +0.31.1 src/PrivateVaultVulnerable.compact src/managed/PrivateVaultVulnerable
scripts.pretest: SKIP_ZK=true compact compile +0.31.1 src/Vault.compact src/managed/Vault && SKIP_ZK=true compact compile +0.31.1 src/PrivateVault.compact src/managed/PrivateVault && SKIP_ZK=true compact compile +0.31.1 src/PrivateVaultVulnerable.compact src/managed/PrivateVaultVulnerable
